TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pnba_maki_yow_na_gaga_na_ms’unan, title = pnba_maki_yow_na_gaga_na_ms’unan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pnba_maki_yow_na_gaga_na_ms’unan} }

S.FORM: pnba maki yow na gaga na ms'unan te utux, gaga na iyik musa magal knerin innagan btiyux gluw na ina ro prasun naha sali ina, mrkyas ro yaba yaya nya, mtswe, ro gluw nya, ro lpyung ga mso'un musa magal ina, gluw knerin ga mnaga mwah gluw mlikuy ro lmon samow urow kya kwara y'aya rasun, wa tegan gluw mlikuy kwara y'aya ro s'agal nya, binah ga mrkyas sbi' nya y'aya yutas yaki, utux utux thawak ga sbi' nya msswe na ina, mkita sa'ing mrkyas laga, ina ga lmon tinun lukus ro splukus nya likuy nya lukus, toyah, snyuw tunux, yubing tutoh, skayal nya likuy nya malax lukus nya micu ro, splukus nya kwara lukus tnunan nya, tmsu'an gaga magal knerin laga, p'abi kya utux gbyan, ptna' gbyan kya ga mlahuy sm'as. te saying, gaga na psbinah sali innagan knerin mybuw cugan sasan, mlikuy hiya ga p'aras sragi na knerin htuw tanux, beta cka tu'iy musa sali ga musa mung owas na sili', myasa yow na mita sili' ga psbinah panga knerin mlikuy ro lmon musa, yaba yaya, msswe, gluw na ina hiya ga satu naha la'iy naha knerin, ro tputing mwah uy, kwara knerin gluw na mlikuy ga miyuk sali, mnaga ro mtama 'pa na mlikuy nya, ina ga sbi' pala yaba yaya, msswe na mlikuy, gluw na mlikuy hiya ga mwah msli sali uy, s'agan naha sinuw ro uwow knaley naha, gmluw gluw na ina mso'un mani' ro mnbuw uwow, mso'un mowas ro miyiy, beta masu' pn'as.

pnba maki yow na gaga na ms'unan te utux, gaga na iyik musa magal knerin innagan btiyux gluw na ina ro prasun naha sali ina, mrkyas ro yaba yaya nya, mtswe, ro gluw nya, ro lpyung ga mso'un musa magal ina, gluw knerin ga mnaga mwah gluw mlikuy ro lmon samow urow kya kwara y'aya rasun, wa tegan gluw mlikuy kwara y'aya ro s'agal nya, binah ga mrkyas sbi' nya y'aya yutas yaki, utux utux thawak ga sbi' nya msswe na ina, mkita sa'ing mrkyas laga, ina ga lmon tinun lukus ro splukus nya likuy nya lukus, toyah, snyuw tunux, yubing tutoh, skayal nya likuy nya malax lukus nya micu ro, splukus nya kwara lukus tnunan nya, tmsu'an gaga magal knerin laga, p'abi kya utux gbyan, ptna' gbyan kya ga mlahuy sm'as. te saying, gaga na psbinah sali innagan knerin mybuw cugan sasan, mlikuy hiya ga p'aras sragi na knerin htuw tanux, beta cka tu'iy musa sali ga musa mung owas na sili', myasa yow na mita sili' ga psbinah panga knerin mlikuy ro lmon musa, yaba yaya, msswe, gluw na ina hiya ga satu naha la'iy naha knerin, ro tputing mwah uy, kwara knerin gluw na mlikuy ga miyuk sali, mnaga ro mtama 'pa na mlikuy nya, ina ga sbi' pala yaba yaya, msswe na mlikuy, gluw na mlikuy hiya ga mwah msli sali uy, s'agan naha sinuw ro uwow knaley naha, gmluw gluw na ina mso'un mani' ro mnbuw uwow, mso'un mowas ro miyiy, beta masu' pn'as.
S.PHON: pnβa maki jow na ɣaɣa na ms~ɕʔunan te utux, ɣaɣa na ijik mus~ɕa maɣal knerin innaɣan βtijux ɣluw na ina ro pras~ɕun naħa s~ɕali ina, mrkjas~ɕ ro jaβa jaja nja, mts~ɕwe, ro ɣluw nja, ro lpjuŋ ɣa ms~ɕoʔun mus~ɕa maɣal ina, ɣluw knerin ɣa mnaɣa mwaħ ɣluw mlikuj ro lmon s~ɕamow urow kja kwara jʔaja ras~ɕun, wa teɣan ɣluw mlikuj kwara jʔaja ro s~ɕʔaɣal nja, βinaħ ɣa mrkjas~ɕ s~ɕβiʔ nja jʔaja jutas~ɕ jaki, utux utux tħawak ɣa s~ɕβiʔ nja ms~ɕs~ɕwe na ina, mkita s~ɕaʔiŋ mrkjas~ɕ laɣa, ina ɣa lmon tinun lukus~ɕ ro s~ɕplukus~ɕ nja likuj nja lukus~ɕ, tojaħ, s~ɕnjuw tunux, juβiŋ tutoħ, s~ɕkajal nja likuj nja malax lukus~ɕ nja miʦ~ʨu ro, s~ɕplukus~ɕ nja kwara lukus~ɕ tnunan nja, tms~ɕuʔan ɣaɣa maɣal knerin laɣa, pʔaβi kja utux ɣβjan, ptnaʔ ɣβjan kja ɣa mlaħuj s~ɕmʔas~ɕ. te s~ɕajiŋ, ɣaɣa na ps~ɕβinaħ s~ɕali innaɣan knerin mjβuw ʦ~ʨuɣan s~ɕas~ɕan, mlikuj ħija ɣa pʔaras~ɕ s~ɕraɣi na knerin ħtuw tanux, βeta ʦ~ʨka tuʔij mus~ɕa s~ɕali ɣa mus~ɕa muŋ owas~ɕ na s~ɕiliʔ, mjas~ɕa jow na mita s~ɕiliʔ ɣa ps~ɕβinaħ paŋa knerin mlikuj ro lmon mus~ɕa, jaβa jaja, ms~ɕs~ɕwe, ɣluw na ina ħija ɣa s~ɕatu naħa laʔij naħa knerin, ro tputiŋ mwaħ uj, kwara knerin ɣluw na mlikuj ɣa mijuk s~ɕali, mnaɣa ro mtama ʔpa na mlikuj nja, ina ɣa s~ɕβiʔ pala jaβa jaja, ms~ɕs~ɕwe na mlikuj, ɣluw na mlikuj ħija ɣa mwaħ ms~ɕli s~ɕali uj, s~ɕʔaɣan naħa s~ɕinuw ro uwow knalej naħa, ɣmluw ɣluw na ina ms~ɕoʔun maniʔ ro mnβuw uwow, ms~ɕoʔun mowas~ɕ ro mijij, βeta mas~ɕuʔ pnʔas~ɕ.
